metadata.description: Yaroslav Yermilov's public showcase of AI-agent skills — an installable Claude Code / Codex plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: How to build a great skills marketplace and the plugins that live in it (plugin-dev): the repo layout, the Claude + Codex dual-manifest packaging, version discipline, and what makes a plugin/skill actually worth installing.

plugins.name: home-it
plugins.description: Home IT skills. check-network: a repeatable playbook to diagnose a slow home network end-to-end (measure throughput / bufferbloat / packet loss / Wi-Fi signal, localize the bottleneck across ISP plan → router → Wi-Fi path → client, inspect the router UI) and rank fixes — wired backhaul first, a second wireless extender never.
